name: Cardiovex
indication: Heart Failure with Reduced Ejection Fraction (HFrEF) in adults with symptomatic NYHA class II–IV
mechanism: Selective cardiac myosin activator that enhances myocardial contractility without increasing intracellular calcium.
efficacy_highlights: Reduced composite of cardiovascular death or heart failure hospitalization by 18% vs standard of care over 12 months
Improved 6-minute walk distance by 28 meters vs baseline at 12 months
safety_highlights: Overall adverse event rates similar to comparator
Transient mild elevations in liver enzymes in 3% of patients
patient_reported_outcomes: Mean improvement in Kansas City Cardiomyopathy Questionnaire overall summary score by 6 points at 12 months among responders
Reported reductions in fatigue and dyspnea vs baseline
